details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ does not.
reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs, reports/audit/ exists. reports/board/ is absent.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in active code and config (excluded reports/audit and docs). moltbot/ directory exists with 5 Python modules (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Scripts reference moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md still documents moltbot as active learning workflow.
